name: ytdigest
description: AI-powered YouTube video analysis with timestamped insights — processes single videos or entire RSS feeds
author: CupBots
intent: Process YouTube RSS feeds or channels for batch video analysis
config: Miniflux instance URL (for RSS batch mode)
Miniflux API key for fetching unread entries

marketplace.tagline: Get AI summaries of any YouTube video with timestamped quotes
marketplace.long_description: Paste a YouTube URL and get a structured AI analysis with clickable timestamped quotes — mental models, actionable ideas, specific numbers, mistakes, and trends. Connect Miniflux RSS to automatically process new videos from your subscribed channels. Every insight links back to the exact moment in the video.
